seo.og_description: We build Revenue Growth Infrastructure for D2C brands — performance marketing, creative systems, ecommerce, and AI automation.

hero.heading: Revenue Growth Infrastructure
hero.subheading: Marketing should translate into measurable business impact. Every Revnox engagement is engineered around the metrics that determine long-term growth.

services.title: Performance Marketing
services.description: High-performance acquisition systems across Meta and Google — structured to identify scalable audiences and unlock consistent revenue growth.

services.title: Creative Intelligence
services.description: Structured creative testing frameworks that rapidly identify winning ad concepts, messaging angles, and storytelling formats.

services.title: Ecommerce Infrastructure
services.description: Shopify stores, high-converting landing pages, and optimized customer journeys that transform traffic into revenue for D2C brands.

services.title: AI Automation
services.description: AI-assisted workflows that streamline marketing operations, creative generation, reporting, and campaign management.

services.title: Influencer Marketing
services.description: Creator programs aligned with performance marketing goals — expanding brand reach while maintaining measurable ROI.

services.title: Data Intelligence
services.description: Analytics systems and dashboards that translate campaign performance into actionable insights for continuous optimization.

case_studies.title: ₹40L → ₹2Cr/month
case_studies.description: Restructured the advertising account, introduced a creative testing framework, and optimized the landing page funnel. Revenue scaled 5x.

case_studies.title: 3.8x Return on Ad Spend
